start.text: Ah, you must be the one who reported the missing manuscript. *flips open notebook* Tell me everything you noticed. Details matter.

choices.text: I saw someone near the restricted section last night.
I just want to help however I can.

clue1.text: *scribbles in notebook* Interesting. The restricted section has its own key. *narrows eyes* Was this person wearing gloves? The answer tells me volumes about intent.

choices.text: Yes, they were wearing dark gloves.
I could not tell from where I stood.

willing.text: That is exactly what I need. *smiles slightly* People who want to help are rarer than you think. Most prefer to look away from mysteries.

doubt.text: *raises an eyebrow* A fair question. Not all who investigate carry badges. *shows worn notebook* My credentials are in every case I have solved. Shall we proceed?

choices.text: Show me what you can do.

key_clue.text: *eyes light up* Gloves. That narrows it considerably. *taps notebook* This was not a crime of opportunity. Someone planned this carefully. I think I know where to look next.

choices.text: What should I do in the meantime?

honest.text: Honesty about what you did not see is as valuable as what you did. *nods approvingly* Many witnesses fabricate details. You are trustworthy.

bond.text: You know, most people find detective work tedious. But you... you see it differently. *closes notebook* I could use someone like you on my cases.

choices.text: I would be honored to help.
Just tell me where to start.

prove.text: *stands and walks to a bookshelf, pulls a volume* This book was reported missing three months ago. I found it behind a false panel. *places it on table* Observe. Deduce. Solve. That is the method.

partner.text: A partner. *slight smile* I have worked alone for a long time. Perhaps it is time for that to change. Come, the trail grows cold.

task.text: Keep your eyes open. Note anything unusual. *tears a page from notebook* My contact information. Call if you see anything suspicious.

choices.text: I will be your eyes and ears.

end_partner.text: *folds notebook shut with purpose* Together, we will solve this. The Great Library has kept its secrets long enough. *walks toward the door* Coming?

end_task.text: Thank you. Every mystery needs someone who cares enough to look closer. *bows slightly* Until we meet again.
